sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19229" key="balaniste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰλᾰν-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n19229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must administer a suppository,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.27</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
